title: Fidacy risk_data Container
description: The container Fidacy populates inside an AP2 Payment Mandate's `risk_data` field. It carries the signed verdict so the payment rail can read (and independently verify) Fidacy's decision. Models the `{ fidacy: { ... } }` object that is the value of `risk_data`.

decision.description: Convenience copy of the signed decision. The authoritative value is the one inside the verified `vc_jws`.

score.description: Convenience copy of the signed score (0..100). Authoritative value lives in the verified `vc_jws`.

vc_jws.description: The compact EdDSA JWS (three base64url segments joined by '.'). Independently verifiable against the public JWKS. This is the source of truth.

signing_key_id.description: The kid of the key that signed `vc_jws`; matches the `did:web:fidacy.com#<kid>` issuer and the JWKS entry.

payload.description: The decoded Risk Payload claims, provided for convenience. Decoders MUST treat the contents of the verified `vc_jws` as authoritative, not this field.
